svg.title: A2M conversion aligned with a real piano recording
svg.desc: Waveform, log-frequency spectrogram, score reference notes, and A2M output for a 30 second excerpt of Bach.
svg.text: A2M conversion aligned with a real piano recording
Bach, Goldberg Variations, Variation 1. Waveform, log-frequency spectrogram, score notes, and A2M output share one time axis.
B Log-frequency spectrogram with A2M note event markers

g.text: C Reference score and A2M output
The score timing is mapped to the active audio section. Each horizontal mark is one note.

svg.text: A2M 3.0.0. CPU, Balanced mode. Expressive velocity. Pedal events enabled.
